title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map matches the garden
gist.blurb: The API reference has been regrown from the live OpenAPI spec. Fewer stale petals, more accurate endpoints.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference stays aligned with deployed behavior.
gist.impact: Developers get documentation that reflects the current production API when building against pollinations endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy API reference garden being refreshed from a glowing production terminal: Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully places updated code-pages among labeled code-plants while a small CRT monitor robot checks the matching endpoint map. The visual metaphor is documentation and deployed API behavior coming back into sync.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot, wearing tiny librarian glasses, tending a garden of updated API documentation pages and code-plants beside a glowing retro terminal; a helpful CRT monitor robot compares a clean endpoint map. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, subtle scanlines, pixel-font text: "API DOCS", retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
